---
title: "Facial contrast declines with age but remains sexually dimorphic throughout adulthood"
authors: "Russell, R., Kramer, S., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2017
date: 2017-01-01
pub-journal: "Adaptive Human Behavior and Physiology"
doi: "10.1007/s40750-017-0068-x"
pdf: "assets/papers/2017/russell_etal_2017.pdf"
categories: [morphometrics]
---
